column1: # Neutral fact corpus (not query-shaped). Paraphrase queries live in train/eval pair files.

column3: Felis catus is a small carnivorous mammal. It produces a low continuous vocalization when content and a short high vocalization when soliciting attention. Domestic lines commonly share dwellings with people and hunt small rodents.
Canis familiaris is a social canid. Individuals vocalize with short explosive sounds, perform object retrieval play, and accompany humans on outdoor excursions.
Aves includes sparrows and eagles. Members have feathers and keratin wings; many species achieve powered flight and construct elevated nests.

Tinyann is a C++17 library for in-memory nearest-neighbor search. It implements brute-force exact scan plus graph and inverted-file approximate indexes including hierarchical navigable small world structures.
Nanollm is a dependency-free C++ runtime for decoder-only transformers. It loads custom checkpoints, runs quantized matrix multiplies, and supports multi-turn token generation.
Nanorag is an application layer that stores document passages, embeds them, retrieves neighbors with a vector index, and conditions a local language model on the selected passages.
Under one atmosphere of pressure, pure H2O transitions from liquid to solid at 273.15 K and from liquid to gas at 373.15 K.
Terra (Earth) completes one revolution about Sol in approximately 365.25 days and retains a single major natural satellite known as the Moon.
Hierarchical navigable small world graphs trade a modest memory overhead for sublinear query time when scanning high-dimensional continuous vectors.
